pr.title: Non-record: 11L Int5 QAT + Score-First TTT — val_bpb 1.1326 (15.51 MB)

output.summary: 11L U-Net pairs Int5 per-row QAT with pre-pruning and score-first TTT on MLP params while adding bigram hash embeddings plus full-layer XSA for tight artifacts.
techniques: Int5 per-row QAT with 15% weight pruning
Score-first TTT updating only MLP params after chunk scoring
Bigram hash embed + cross-layer shared attention across all layers
